case_title: JAMES MCKAY VS. FOUR STAR AUTOMOTIVE, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$125.00) [DOCUMENT STAMPED: 'BY FAX'] SERVED MAY-22-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FOUR STAR AUTOMOTIVE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCKAY, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOUR STAR AUTOMOTIVE, INC. $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF JAMES MCKAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FOUR STAR AUTOMOTIVE, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY QUINTIN QUINTANA. COURT NOTES DEFENDANT'S BUSINESS IS LOCATED IN SAN MATEO COUNTY AND SAN MATEO IS THE CORRECT VENUE FOR THIS CASE. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WISH TO DISMISS THIS MATTER AND REQUESTS THE CASE GO FORWARD TODAY IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
